scripts.local:dev: npm run web:build && bash -lc 'trap "kill 0" INT TERM EXIT; npm run server:local & npm run web:watch & npm run web:serve & wait'
scripts.deploy:update: npm install && npm run web:build && cd infra && docker-compose up -d --build
scripts.deploy:main: git fetch && git checkout main && git pull && npm run deploy:update
scripts.deploy:dev: git fetch && git checkout dev && git pull && npm run deploy:update
